Research.title: [Promo Code] GO Tour Fairy Type Timed Research
Research.description:
All Trainers can redeem the following code to receive Fairy type Timed Research available starting with Pokémon GO Tour in person events.
Code: TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH Quick Redeem: https://store.pokemongo.com/offer-redemption?passcode=TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH
It is not clear when this promo code will expire. The dates shown on this page are for the Timed Research.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Catch Cup: Memories in Motion: Great League Edition | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Catch Cup: Memories in Motion: Great League Edition will run from May 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to May 19, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Pokémon caught during the Memories in Motion Season are eligible.
- Pokémon must be caught between March 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. and June 2, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. local time.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from May 19, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to May 26, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from May 26, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to June 2, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.

Raid Battles.title: Buzzwole, Pheromosa, and Xurkitree in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Buzzwole, Pheromosa, and Xurkitree will be in five-star raid battles from May 13, 2026 to May 19, 2026.
- Buzzwole will appear in the Americas and Greenland.
- Pheromosa will appear in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India.
- Xurkitree will appear in the Asia-Pacific region.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring these Pokemon from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- May 13
These Pokemon will remain in their respective regions.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Glalie in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Glalie will be in Mega Raids from May 13, 2026 at 6 am to May 20, 2026 at 6 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Tapu Bulu in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:

Raid Battles.description: Mega Altaria will be in Mega Raids from May 20, 2026 at 6 am to May 27, 2026 at 6 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Tapu Fini in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:

Raid Battles.title: Shadow Cresselia in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description: Shadow Cresselia will appear in Pokemon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Cresselia! Shadow Cresselia will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from May 6 to June 2.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Medicham in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Medicham will be in Mega Raids from May 27, 2026 at 6 am to June 3, 2026 at 6 am local time.

Raid Hour.title: Tapu Bulu Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Tapu Bulu is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Tapu Fini Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Tapu Fini is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Combee during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On May 25, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Combee.
- Combee

Timed Research.title: Choose Your Path Timed Research (May 19, 2026)
Timed Research.description:
Niantic is testing a new branching Timed Research format during “evergreen weeks,” which are weeks without major events where seasonal gameplay takes focus.
This Timed Research lets you choose your own way to play for the week by selecting one of three branches based on exploration, skill, or battling.
Choose wisely! You can select only one path and remain on that path until the end of the Timed Research.
Each path grants a different event bonus and includes different tasks and rewards.

Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Tokyo

bonuses: 1.5× Hatch Candy
1.5× Hatch Stardust
1/2 Egg Hatch Distance
1/2 Stardust cost for all trades
2-hour Incense duration (excluding Daily Adventure Incense)
2-hour Lure Module duration
2× Catch Candy
Hourly event-themed Field Research
Increased chance of catching Pokémon with a Premier Ball
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon for ticket holders
Increased time for Party Play sessions
Open up to 50 Gifts each ticketed citywide gameplay day
Special event-themed Eggs
Special event-themed stickers available from PokéStops and Gifts
Trainer Challenges: four Timed Research challenges across Tokyo that count toward the Pokémon GO Expert medal
Up to 6 Special Trades per day
Up to 9 daily Raid Passes by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
spawns: Caterpie wearing a Poké Ball hat

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Location: Tokyo Waterfront City, Tokyo, Japan Dates: May 29–June 1, 2026 Time: 10:00 a.m. – 8:00 p.m. JST (Park and citywide event hours vary by ticket)
Trainers can look forward to exceptional coaching by Team Mystic’s leader, Blanche, during an exciting park session in Tokyo Waterfront City that will help them become their very best. Ticket-holding Trainers will also set off on a citywide adventure across four distinct City Districts in Tokyo, developing their skills and earning a unique in-game Pokémon GO Expert medal.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the park experience within Tokyo Waterfront City during the date and time noted on your event ticket. Citywide gameplay requires either a Base event ticket with citywide gameplay, a Citywide Gameplay add-on, or a City Explorer ticket.

Citywide gameplay requires either a Base event ticket with citywide gameplay, a Citywide Gameplay add-on, or a City Explorer ticket.

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global! This worldwide event takes place from July 11, 2026 at 10 am to July 12, 2026 at 7 pm local time.
For the first time, GO Fest: Global is free for all Trainers who log in during event weekend. Everyone can access the featured Special Research, event bonuses, and increased Shiny encounter opportunities at no cost.

bonuses: 1 Additional Candy for evolving Pokemon
2x Incense duration
Increased chance to receive Candy XL for evolving Pokemon (Trainers Level 31+)

Event.description:
The Blanche’s Quest for Knowledge event will take place from May 26, 2026 at 10 am to June 1, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Example Event Template (Auto ToC Demo)
Event.description:
This file demonstrates the reusable event pattern:
- Keep all section if blocks in the template body.
- Set event_toc_auto: true.
- Fill data lists only for sections you want to show.
- Leave unused section data empty to auto-hide both section and ToC item.

Season.title: Memories in Motion

bonuses: Increased XP and Stardust for a seven-day Pokémon catch streak
Increased XP for a seven-day PokéStop spin streak
One additional Candy when trading Pokémon in-person
One guaranteed Candy XL when trading Pokémon in-person (Trainers level 31+)

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Memories in Motion!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.

GO Pass.description:
Rank up to earn rewards including an encounter with Suicune, up to 1,400 total PokéCoins, and more!
From Tuesday, May 5, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, June 2, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for May will be available in Pokémon GO!
